## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo llvm-cov --all-targets --fail-under-lines 80`
- [ ] `cargo audit`
- [ ] package checks, if packaging changed

## Agent Checklist

- [ ] I followed `AGENTS.md` if this PR was agent-authored.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-visible behavior.
- [ ] I did not publish packages, push tags, or modify credentials.
